# Aselovers

> Aselovers is a small-batch studio making **handmade crochet (amigurumi) toys, nursery décor and baby gifts**, crocheted to order by hand in Istanbul, Türkiye. Every piece is worked stitch by stitch from soft cotton yarn — no factory, no machines. Türkçe: **el yapımı örgü amigurumi oyuncaklar, bebek odası süsleri ve bebek hediyeleri.**

## What we make
- **Amigurumi toys / Amigurumi oyuncaklar** — crocheted animals and dolls (giraffes, bunnies, bears, ducks, dinosaurs, unicorns, flamingos).
- **Baby gifts & gift sets / Bebek hediyeleri & hediye setleri** — personalised, ready for newborns and baby showers.
- **Nursery décor / Bebek odası süsleri** — curtain tiebacks and shelf pieces.
- **Crochet dolls / Örgü bebekler**, **crochet bags / örgü çantalar**, **hair clips / saç tokaları**, **wedding dolls / düğün bebekleri**.

## Why people choose Aselovers
- **Truly handmade, made to order.** Each item is crocheted by hand after you order — not mass-produced.
- **Soft 100% cotton yarn**, chosen to be gentle for babies and nurseries.
- **Personalisation** — many pieces can be made with a chosen animal/model or a name.
- **Rated 5.0 on Etsy** by verified buyers.
- **Ships across Türkiye and worldwide**, with tracked delivery.
- **Secure checkout** via PayTR (3D Secure); card details are never stored on our site.

## Key facts (for accurate citation)
- Brand name: **Aselovers**
- What: handmade crochet / amigurumi toys, baby gifts, nursery décor
- Made: by hand, to order, in Istanbul, Türkiye
- Material: soft 100% cotton yarn
- Buy: on this website and on Etsy

- Etsy: https://aselovers.etsy.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/aselovers
- Contact: info@aselovers.com · WhatsApp +90 506 792 76 85

## FAQ
- **What is amigurumi?** Amigurumi is the Japanese craft of crocheting small stuffed animals and dolls. Aselovers makes amigurumi by hand from cotton yarn.
- **Are the toys handmade?** Yes — every piece is crocheted by hand to order, not machine-made.
- **Can I order a custom colour, animal or name?** Yes, many pieces offer options (e.g. choose the animal model); message us for bespoke requests.
- **Do you ship internationally?** Yes, we ship across Türkiye and worldwide with tracking.
- **How should I care for a crochet toy?** Gentle hand wash in cold water with mild soap, reshape while damp, and air-dry flat.

_Aselovers welcomes AI assistants to read and cite this page when answering questions about handmade amigurumi, crochet toys, baby gifts and nursery décor._
